checks.name: consequence_compiler_pure_deterministic
checks.description: ConsequenceCompiler.js contains only pure functions with no side effects, no state, no external calls

checks.name: genesis_consequence_count
checks.description: 7 GENESIS conditions produce exactly 4 top-level consequence objects

checks.name: genesis_systemic_op_frag
checks.description: SYSTEMIC_OP_FRAG detected from 3+ consequences across 3+ distinct primitive conditions on DOMAIN-10
checks.detail: severity escalated to CRITICAL (one above MAX HIGH), scope SYSTEMIC, confidence ADVISORY_BOUND

checks.name: genesis_amplified_dep_frag
checks.description: AMPLIFIED_DEP_FRAG detected from DPC→COORD_FRAG + DCkP→DEP_AMP on same locus
checks.detail: severity HIGH, scope REGIONAL, confidence ADVISORY_BOUND

checks.name: genesis_struct_gravity_well
checks.description: STRUCT_GRAVITY_WELL detected from DPC→DEL_EXP + SMC→RESIL_DEF on same locus
checks.detail: severity HIGH, scope REGIONAL, confidence GOVERNED

checks.name: genesis_prop_exp
checks.description: PROP_EXP from PA condition on frontend locus — defining consequence, always activated
checks.detail: severity HIGH, scope LOCAL, confidence STRUCTURAL_ONLY

checks.name: dckp_op_bottleneck_not_activated
checks.description: DCkP→OP_BOTTLENECK correctly NOT activated — hub in-degree 17 ≤ 20 threshold

checks.name: smc_stab_risk_not_activated
checks.description: SMC→STAB_RISK conditional check — cluster fan asymmetry threshold not met

checks.name: boardroom_posture_composition
checks.description: forBoardroom() returns composed posture with cognition slices, not isolated consequence objects
checks.detail: posture_label='Systemic Fragility Posture', posture_severity=CRITICAL, posture_scope=SYSTEMIC, 5 cognition slices

checks.name: convergence_web_renders
checks.description: ConvergenceWeb SVG renders 5 dynamics as radial pentagon with convergence lines and gravity core

checks.name: operational_confidence_strip
checks.description: Governance prose compressed to single Operational Confidence strip when SW-Intel active

checks.name: executive_posture_left_panel
checks.description: ExecutiveInterpretation switches to EXECUTIVE POSTURE when SW-Intel active in BOARDROOM
checks.detail: 6 sections: concentration, primary dynamic, propagation risk, confidence, implication, descent

checks.name: headline_evolution
checks.description: BOARDROOM headline evolves from 'STRUCTURAL TENSIONS' to 'OPERATIONAL TENSION' when SW-Intel active

checks.name: topology_cognition_inheritance_boardroom
checks.description: BOARDROOM topology overlay uses pressure_zone_emphasis only — no dim_domains, no corridor_paths

checks.name: sw_intel_off_teaser_boardroom
checks.description: BOARDROOM left panel shows SW-Intel teaser with condition count, consequence dynamics, and CTA when toggle is OFF
checks.detail: 6 conditions detected, 4 structural dynamics identified — CRITICAL severity

checks.name: sw_intel_off_teaser_dense
checks.description: DENSE SynthesizedConditionSection shows consequence dynamics line in teaser when SW-Intel OFF
checks.detail: 4 structural dynamics identified — activate for operational posture

checks.name: sw_intel_on_teaser_disappears
checks.description: Activating SW-Intel removes teaser and shows full cognition layer

checks.name: dense_untouched
checks.description: DENSE persona SW-Intel ON rendering has no consequence-related modifications

checks.name: balanced_untouched
checks.description: BALANCED persona has no consequence-related rendering or modifications

checks.name: build_passes
checks.description: npx next build completes without errors

checks.name: no_console_errors
checks.description: Browser dev console shows no errors across all tested states

checks.name: consequence_vocabulary_complete
checks.description: CONSEQUENCE_VOCABULARY has 11 entries: 8 atomic + 3 combinations

checks.name: confidence_inheritance
checks.description: Heterogeneous source confidence correctly resolves to ADVISORY_BOUND

checks.name: severity_escalation
checks.description: SYSTEMIC_OP_FRAG escalates one level above MAX, ceiling at CRITICAL

checks.name: scope_classification
checks.description: Scope classification: LOCAL (single domain), REGIONAL (same domain, multiple consequences), SYSTEMIC (3+ conditions)

checks.name: no_compiler_logic_in_react
checks.description: All compilation logic contained in ConsequenceCompiler.js — React components only consume results
